specific_question: As of January 2024, what is the format of documentation that patients received immediately after their virtual consultation ended?
answer: As of January 2024, patients received an automated email in HTML format with appointment date and provider name, itemized billing breakdown, next steps, and follow-up instructions. This information was sent through a 2-8 page email after the full visit summary was manually processed.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
